title: Artificial Intelligence and Grade Inflation. CSHE Higher Education Working Paper Series. Vol 26-3
snippet: Generative AI tools can undermine the informational value of grades by performing graded course tasks. The author analyzes the impact of AI on grade distributions across more than 500,000 grades at a large research university from 2018 to 2025. title: Why I Created the National AI Equity Lab
